transcript: that whole idea of, you know, keep investing, investing, and after a few years you'll be a crorepati. That is so flawed. But it is all about money in the age that you are at. You never want to be having like 10 crores in the bank at 40. You would rather have five crores when you're 25. That's what people don't understand. Like, it's so much better to invest that small money that you have at the start of your career into experiences. Like TK, you can keep some 5,000 for investing in SIPs. Don't just say no to it, like I did in the two years. spend the Rs. 30000 on skills, on hobbies, on networking events, on travelling, and those experiences will pay you back in multiples, in the next month itself, not even like 50 years later.

caption:
Finfluencers will HATE me for this!

But i had to say it.

Ive grown up reading robert kiyosaki, watching the biggest finance creators tell me to do SIPs so that later you will have a financially rich future.

And somewhere along the way, the youth forgot the idea of investing in themselves, in experiences, in things like upskilling, travelling, hobbies, things that will make you an interesting person in any room. All for maximising that monthtly SIP by cutting down all expenses so that 10-20years later you can be “rich”.

Thoughts?

transcript: बाबा दोस्ट बिजनेस नहीं चल रहा, प्राइवेट लिमिटेड कमनी क्लोस करनी है, इतना एजी नहीं है, इस रिल को पूरा देख लीजे, पूरा प्रोसेस समझा देता हूँ. लेकिन अगर आपने बिजनेस चालू कर दिया है प्राइवेट लिमिटेड कमनी के अंदर उसके बाद में आप अपना bank account close करवा दे इसके बाद ROC को inform करना पड़ता है STK2 strike of form के अंदर इसको fill करके prescribed fee के साथ आप ROC को intimate कीजिए और फिर जब ROC आपकी application को approve कर देते हैं तो वो एक email पे confirmation देते हैं और एक्टिव कंपनी की लिस्ट में से आपका नाम रिमूव कर दिया जाता है याद रखिए कि कंपनी क्लोस करने से पहले आपके सारे ड्यूज चाहिए वह क्रेडिटर्स के ड्यूज हो चाहिए वह टैक्स डिपार्टमेंट के ड्यूज हो चाहिए वह वेंडर्स के ड्यू

caption:
Apni Private Limited Close Karna Chahte Ho? 🤔

Process yeh hai:

NIL Filing Requirement 🗓️

Business chalu hai to 2 saal tak NIL filing (no transactions, no sales).
No Business Commenced 🚀

Business chalu nahi kiya to 1 saal me band kar sakte hain. Commencement of business form file karna padega.
Bank Account Closure 🏦

Bank account close karwao. Uske baad ROC ko inform karo.
Form STK-2 📝

‘STK-2’ form fill up karke, fees ke sath ROC ko submit karo.
ROC Acceptance ✅

ROC application accept karta hai to company officially closed declare hoti hai aur naam remove hota hai.
Pending Obligations 💼

Company close karne se pehle, saare dues clear karne padte hain (employees, vendors, taxes).
Apni company close karani hai? Comment “close” and we will help you! 😊
